channel.title: Comments for page "The Kaiju Sea"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Kaiju Sea"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: While this is a bit expositionary and deviates from the usual SH tone a bit, it is constructed pretty well, and I found it enjoyable.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: So the Hand wants to study them, but lack the means to do so effectively. They can, however, hire this Brother of Hugin to get them a small example. Seems they could earn a lot from just working with the Jailors for once.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This spends far too much time regurgitating content from the recent WOAF articles without bringing enough original material to the table. It's even harder to get through considering that it's primarily written in a dry formal tone better suited to SCP articles.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
- D'arr, the laws of physics be a harsh mistress.

- I mean non-euclidean in the Lovecraftian, cosmic horror sense of the word, not the actual definition of non-euclidean.

- Maybe, but it's not crucial information and there's already a link to the hub, plus it's set as the parent page. Too many links are annoying, so I prefer to only link when the reader truly needs it to understand what I'm talking about.

- It was a Trump joke, but now that you bring it up it also works as a Pacific Rim joke.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Still liking this direction.

Underwater fire? You mean like on Spongebob? - LL

I prefer Futurama. "That just raises further questions!"

non-euclidean biology

I don't think you could construct any euclidean biology. The outer surface of human skin, for example, must be constructed with non-euclidean geometry, clearly. An eyeball constructed with only euclidean geometry is inconceivable. What organisms is the Serpent's hand studying that have euclidean biology?

And if you're ever at Pretty Penny's and feel like dropping a few hundred pounds on lunch, you can try them yourself - Nemo

Seems like a good place for a crosslink.

We could build a wall? - the Vandertramp

I can't tell if this is a Trump joke or a Pacific Rim joke.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Image Source: https://pixabay.com/en/planet-moon-all-abstract-universe-1039946/

So here's my contribution to Team Mikasa's doomsday contest entries, The Kaiju Sea. Thanks to my teammates and everyone else who took a look at this.

This is also my first Serpent Hand's format, hurray! I decided to try something different for the contest, and I think I'm happy with how this turned out.
